name: Elemental HERO Grand Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> グラン・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Grand Mole"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; return that target to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Return this card to the Extra Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
